title: Taqueritos Party with Carne Asada
ingredients: 2 cups cooked, chopped carne asada (grilled steak)
instructions: Step 1. Place a layer of whole Taqueritos Chile Toreado on a plate or tray to form the base.
Step 2. In a skillet, heat the creole sofrito over medium heat and pour it over the Taqueritos, spreading it evenly.
Step 3. In the same skillet, warm the carne asada until hot and place it on top of the sauce.
Step 4. Add a scoop of guacamole over the meat and serve with sour cream to taste.
Step 5. Finish with chopped scallions and sprinkle crushed Taqueritos Chile Toreado on top for extra crunch and heat before serving.
